title: cyclosorus larutensis
intro: Cyclosorus larutensis, a species of fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus larutensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or even used fresh in salads, although its herbal preparations and effects may vary depending on the specific region and cultural context.
